name: Equifax Controls Framework
description: Equifax's proprietary controls framework with published mappings to CIS Controls and NIST CSF. Made public to share their internal controls language with vendors and partners.
relationToCloudSecurity: Vendor-specific controls; primarily of interest to Equifax partners and credit-reporting ecosystem.

license.notes: Vendor-published framework. Verify specific license terms at the source URL before redistribution.

links.acquisition_blocker_resolved: HTTP 404. Equifax may have removed or restructured the framework page.

current_extraction.notes: Captured via playwright headless browser. Equifax made their controls framework public — the dedicated site is controlsframework.equifax.com (not the corporate site /security/controls/ which 404s). Underlying structured data is also published at github.com/Equifax-Public/SecurityControlsFramework (upstream-authoritative).
